summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PHASE 3.2 Policy Guard Layer. Core policy functionality working correctly with proper constraints enforcement, confidence filtering, and emergency mode restrictions. One minor issue with policy history endpoint JSON serialization.

minor_bugs.issue: 500 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId JSON serialization
minor_bugs.details: ValueError: ObjectId object is not iterable - needs proper JSON serialization for MongoDB ObjectId objects

passed_tests: Policy Health Check - Module responds correctly with v3.2
Policy Status - Emergency mode and cycle status working
Policy Configuration - All limits correctly set (max_actions_per_cycle: 5, max_disable_per_cycle: 2)
Policy Apply Basic - Proper action filtering and response structure
Max Actions Limit - Correctly enforces 5 actions per cycle limit
Max Disable Limit - Correctly enforces 2 disable actions per cycle limit
Confidence Filter - Blocks low confidence actions (disable < 0.7, increase_allocation < 0.75)
Emergency Mode Toggle - Successfully enables/disables emergency mode
Emergency Mode Restrictions - Only allows disable/reduce_risk actions in emergency
Action Priority - Processes actions in correct priority order (disable first)
Full Pipeline Integration - Calibration → Policy → Application pipeline working
Cycle Cooldown Mechanism - Properly prevents rapid successive cycles (24h cooldown)
Force Cycle Reset - Admin function to reset cooldown working
All PHASE 3.1 Action Application Engine tests - 12/12 passed
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix MongoDB ObjectId JSON serialization issue in policy history endpoint. The error occurs when trying to serialize ObjectId objects to JSON in the FastAPI response. Need to convert ObjectId to string before JSON serialization.

success_percentage.policy_guard: 90% (9/10 policy-specific tests passed, 1 minor serialization issue)
